title: Panel II: How the Belt and Road Initiative Is Changing Africa
description:
Opening remarks, A Role for Europe in the Belt and Road Initiative
Hussein Askary, Southwest Asia Coordinator of the Schiller Institute 3:26
Wang Hao, Embassy of the People’s Republic of China to the Federal Republic of Germany, 1st Secretary for Economy and Trade 14:45
After the Transaqua Breakthrough, Nigeria Comes to the Fore
H.E. Yusuf Maitama Tuggar, Ambassador of the Federal Republic of Nigeria to Germany  24:22
The Impact of Transaqua on the Future Development of Africa
Mohammed Bila, Expert Modeler, Lake Chad Basin Observatory, Lake Chad Basin Commission  38:30
What Pan-Africanism on the Silk Road? 
Amzat Boukari-Yabara, African Historian, General Secretary of the Panafrican League Umoja  1:01:18
Current Situation and Challenges for Peace as Precondition for Reconstruction of Yemen, Representative of the Yemeni Association Insan for Human Rights and Peace  1:21:12
Operation Felix : Yemen’s Reconstruction and Connection to the Belt and Road
Hussein Askary, Southwest Asia Coordinator of the Schiller Institute 1:41:00
Greetings to the Conference from Prof. Michele Geraci,
Newly Appointed Undersecretary of State to the Ministry for Economic Development, Italy  2:10:52
